title: Newk's Eatery
description: Regional chain offering a menu of salads, pizzas & sandwiches in a casual setting.

user_reviews.Name: BRI (Bri)
user_reviews.Description:
I always eat here and it’s always a hit. Today I ordered the 3pair 2 sandwiches and one soup. I got home and opened up my second sandwich and it was way wrong.  I ordered half chicken salad for my second.
-No meat what so ever. Literally just break and one squeeze of mayo and 1 tomato and one sad lettuce.

This ruined my dinner now I have to go back out and get food 😭

Now I know before I leave the restaurant, I will always verify all my food is correct

user_reviews.Name: Dominique A McGaha
user_reviews.Description: My sister introduced me to Newk’s. Haven’t stopped thinking about the pizza since. My first solo trip to Newk’s was great, the staff were friendly, service was quick, and the pizza again was amazing! Thanks so much!

user_reviews.Name: Scott Plasterer
user_reviews.Description: Thought this place would be better. Crab/lobster bisque and loaded potato soup...both luke warm at best. Potato soup had off taste. Nuke Q was OK, wife had the goddess salad, meh at best. You may want to go to McAlisters down the street, pretty sure we will be in the future😔

user_reviews.Name: Emily Santos
user_reviews.Description: Excellent place for lunch! It was my first time here and I was pleasantly surprised!! I wish I had known how good it was sooner! I order the half sandwich half salad with portobello vegetable sandwich and house salad. The portobello vegetable sandwich was soooo gooood!!!!! Pricing was not bad and all our food came out quickly. I would definitely eat here again.

user_reviews.Name: Doug Caldwell
user_reviews.Description: We couldn't make up our mind where to go for lunch so this made a good choice. Spoiled with so many places to eat in Collin county. Not too long ago we ate at the Frisco location and it was great. So we needed to do errands in the area and this place fit the bill and our stomach. We both got salads, generous I might add, so we had plenty for leftovers. Good service. See interior photos. Nice to have another salad place in town.

user_reviews.Name: Reci Woodert
user_reviews.Description: I have had the sandwiches and soups. This isn't my favorite place for sandwiches. North Dallas has so many good sandwich places. The bread and veggies where good on the sandwiches. The Po'boy is not a traditional one. Which is odd, because I am used to a traditional Louisiana type of po'boy. (I am not from there) That's where the sandwich originated from. I also had a chicken sandwich. The chicken is dried cooked with no seasoning, so it only taste good in the sandwich. I tasted the chicken alone. It was very nasty. The soups are good. I have not tried their pizza yet or desserts. I would go back to try, but if they prep there sandwiches with the same meat. I question how it is. Alot of good pizza places as well in the area. The competition over here is good! Update: I got the cobb with chicken. It's so nasty. It's just boiled chicken with no seasoning. The rest of the salad is good. I just don't see myself coming back. Not even for the pizza.

user_reviews.Name: Emily Bragg
user_reviews.Description:
We hadn’t been in a while and it was incredibly delicious. I had the trio with lobster bisque, Caesar salad, and Italian half sandwich. Everything was so flavorful and tasty. My husband had the pimento Mac and cheese, avocado and shrimp salad, and half French dip sandwich. He loved all of it. Our girls had kids pizza. They looked so good that I wanted to eat it! Kids meals came with a drink.
The staff was kind and very friendly.
Tonight reminded me why I have enjoyed Newk’s for so long. Perfect meal.

user_reviews.Name: Nancy Salinas
user_reviews.Description: This place you stand in line to order and pay first, then they bring bring the food to your table the food was good, I ate a slice of my friends pizza and it was very good. The workers were very nice , friendly and clean. I shall definitely be coming back 👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nancy Salinas
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place you stand in line to order and pay first, then they bring bring the food to your table the food was good, I ate a slice of my friends pizza and it was very good. The workers were very nice , friendly and clean. I shall definitely be coming back 👍

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kassandra Acuña
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This is my favorite, must have, sandwich/Salad/soup place! Everything I’ve tried here has been delicious! The flavors are on point, their dressings/sauces are amazing! I’ve recently started going with the half sandwich and cup of soup option just so I can enjoy two menu items! I love that they have certain soups on different days, it gives a nice variety. I’ve fallen in love with the loaded potato soup and the broccoli and cheese soup while my husband loves the lobster and crab bisque! Our go to sandwiches are the Italian, Royal and the Steam Chimichurri! Try anything on the menu! ALSO... (I can’t remember which days) but the kids meals are .99 with a purchase of an adult meal and beverage. My kids love their food and actually finish it all - that’s rare!
Highly recommend!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Robert Montoya
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered a wrap and a soup. The lobster bisque soup had an oily layer on top and the wrap was horrible, vegetables were not fresh and wilted, wrap was all cracked, and the cold cuts tasted as if past expiration.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yon S
user_reviews_extended.Description: I always loved this place but it's far from my home so I stopped by when I was in the area. The experience was great! I ordered on the kiosk but couldn't find the new drinks on the menu so I ordered a tea. I asked the lady at the counter if I can just replace the drink and I would gladly pay the difference. The believe the young lady that was the manager, just replaced it without any issue. These are the little things that make a difference to me. I appreciate her understanding and willingness to help with a good attitude. Thank you again and I will be back to this location!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: The Truth
user_reviews_extended.Description: Sadly, I have to give a one star review.   The food is just horrible. The quality of the food is just so bad.   Not trying to be rude, but the gas station Food is better.  However, I will mention that the customer service and staff members are up to par and do give good service.  Just the food does not match the quality of the service  .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aparna Tiwari (The wandering foodie)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice place for pasta , pizza sandwiches soups and salads. They have a good vegetarian options too to choose from. We had portebella mushroom pizza , pimento cheese sandwich and tomato basil soup. Food was good , prices were decent. It’s a nice huge place to seating is not a concern and has good seating options . Perfect for healthy eaters . They do have cauli crust pizza introduced newly so yeah we have some gluten free and Leto options too.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shelia Gatlin
user_reviews_extended.Description: Was at the hospital with my husband and didn't want "hospital food" so ordered from Newks right up the road.  When I got there, the line was out the door but I walked right in and picked up my order off the shelf and was on my way back to the hospital.  Great sandwich and potato salad!

user_reviews_extended.Name: YPA Motion
user_reviews_extended.Description: Yes, I was there to do a big pickup order which was costly for a company.Just felt like people that work.There should be more helpful and welcoming. When people show up for a pickup order, find out who they are.Why they are there?Because time is everything.That's why usually I prefer to deal with a general manager who cares about the bottom line. The idea is to get the orders out fast.So food will not get cold or customers.Won't change their mind

user_reviews_extended.Name: Annette Doubledee
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Had a sandwich and pasta salad.

Sat outside with our group of friends.  Was a little too cool that day for me but otherwise a pleasant experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelly Robinson
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve officially died and gone to heaven!!!!! This place is EVERYTHINGGGGGGG y’all! Today is my first time ever eating here. I accidentally called myself ordering at the “pick up food” counter instead of the true order counter. I told Steven, the manager, that it was my first time visiting. I have some food restrictions and he had the patience of Job while explaining the menu items to me and showing me the layout of how things work, where the menus are, etc. He was extreme polite and knowledgeable and I never felt pressurized or rush to place my order. Instead, I took my time and took it all in. Based off of his recommendation I ordered the spicy shrimp pizza and it is incredible! Spicy, fresh( Steven told me here at Newk’s they cook everything fresh, from scratch-I can definitely tell) crunchy light crust that reminds me of a deep-dish crust but THIN!, fresh vegetables, it’s seasoned well. oh my goodness it’s to die for! And the strawberry cake is unfathomable it’s so delicious. Chris took my order and he was all-smiles, pleasant and extremely hospitable-everyone was. I was greeted by several employees and I can tell that Newk’s really values its employees and stands by their products. I will more than likely return tomorrow for more delicious goodness. It was such a pleasure dining here. If you haven’t tried Newk’s yet, you won’t be disappointed...if you have-you already understand the hype! This will be my new favorite place to dine at!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charles Boltas
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Fantastic salad! I ordered the Greek salad with lemon vinaigrette and "all natural chicken.". The vinaigrette was very lemony (which I like) and there were plenty of ingredients in the salad to keep me looking for more. I have no complaints.

If I had to be really picky, I wish the chicken wasn't sliced deli meat. I wish it was chunks fo grilled chicken. Once again, that's just being nit picky.

I will eat here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Julie Weston
user_reviews_extended.Description: This was my second time eating here. The food is good with satisfying portions. The service was hit or miss depending on the employee. The dining room is LOUD.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ashley Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I  very disappointed by the managers reaction to an employees keys going missing. The manager blew off the poor girl. I helped her look for her keys and retrace her steps w no luck. Mind you she pulled up on her bike as I pulled into the parking lot so I followed her in. I did not see her drop keys. Seems like an employee had to take them as they went missing in a matter of minutes.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aretha
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Great service and nice food. The pictures don't do the food justice.  I dumped everything in a carry out container. It was prettier on the plate and in the restaurant.

Definitely try the lemon cake and lemon whoopie pie.  They are summer seasonal items and delicious. The sandwich is The Royal with pasta salad.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Barry Townsend
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice place. Nice service, food was a little pricey for what it was. I'd go back, but it wouldn't be my first choice. Maybe I got the wrong thing? I've never had pimento cheese on a Philly before

user_reviews_extended.Name: Vee Butters
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered the PB slice of cake, through door dash, it was hard, dry, & stale. Waste of money, I'll stick with the Strawberry. Paid $7.99 & only refunded $5.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Maples
user_reviews_extended.Description: Staff was great very friendly even after a big lunch rush. The sandwiches tasted great and we really like the spicy relish. Will definitely be back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: The Luis Torres
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time trying Newk’s and it did not disappoint! There is a wide range of items to choose from and the food and service were excellent. There is indoor seating and a nice large patio when the weather permits. Will be coming back for lunch sometime.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Eric Jackson
user_reviews_extended.Description: My family loves going to Newk’s Eatery for consistently delicious food and courteous service. The dining room is clean and well staffed.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Douglas
user_reviews_extended.Description: I don’t usually give good reviews because when I do I am mad. But I have the supremes pizza and the Turkey avocado and the brownie from the place… SOOOO GOOOD. Sooo good. Infact, I can say I will never order from McAlisters again.. this place is good and the options are many.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Prissy Proper
user_reviews_extended.Description: The young ladies that work there are nice. I had never been and they were super helpful in offering suggestions. I got a club sandwich, it was just okay.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nikkie West
user_reviews_extended.Description: The pesto chicken sandwich, Greek salad, and baked potatoe soup is my favorite.  I have found my favorite place to have lunch!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dee F.
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love the Newks at the Plano location. Always exceptional customer service & the food is equally good. I hope this location continues to thrive.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jorge Ramirez
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time here..my wife order their potato soup and Cesar salad and it was very good and fresh..we liked and will be back again

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brian Hiatt
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time. Had pizza salad and chocolate cake. Very good nice staff. I will be back

user_reviews_extended.Name: Natasha Oliveira
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time eating here and I love it!! The service was super quick, the food was delicious and the atmosphere was clean

user_reviews_extended.Name: Toya Hurley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Second time ordering pizza and its bad under cooked terrible flavor. Just a blob of ingredients placed n the center.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jessica Espinoza
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My go to here is always the pizza and I can’t really help it
It’s just so good lol
Most of the time the crust is perfect sometimes it can be a bit crispy
I will be back to try more

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gladys Quiroz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Green Goddess Salad is the best!!! Refreshing filling great salad for hot summer day!!! Accompanied by tomato soup.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christopher Pride
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great food at a great price. The kids' deal on Saturdays is unbeatable, and the coconut cake we had was amazing! We like to come here before or after some outdoor time at Arbor Hills.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Allan Bosko
user_reviews_extended.Description: We love the food at Newks and it is so reasonable!  Also love the redo of the interior dining room!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Evelyn Baskin
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love this Newks near Parker and the DNT.  Food and service is always wonderful and the Newks team are happy. You will be greeted with a smile and everyone, yes everyone, is smiling as they work and serve customers. It’s a refreshing place to have a nice meal!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Maya Bailey
user_reviews_extended.Description: I LOVE this place. The lobster bisque soup is amazing (along with the loaded potato). The Italian is my absolute fav from this place! Savory and tangy! The staff are always super nice and are awesome about cleaning a table for you when it's busy. I recommend Newks to anyone who loves sandwiches!

user_reviews_extended.Name: KubikRubik
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love this place! Everything is delicious! Clean and nice ,friendly staff ! Service is good and fast!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Thomas Hendrick
user_reviews_extended.Description: Please update your times. I just drove 30 minutes here because the site says you open at 10. Doors say 11.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Anthony Pegues
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Wow!! Great place!! Excellent food!! Friendly staff!!
I’ve been here several times and it’s been Fantastic every time, I Love their Salads and their Sandwiches are Super Fantastic!! Plus their Soups are Really Really Good. Just an all around Great Place.
Don’t Miss Out on this One!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kacey
user_reviews_extended.Description: Delicious food, perfect to order ahead and pick up for lunch, or meet up with friends!! This will definitely be a new regular place for me!

user_reviews_extended.Name: N. Brown
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love Newks. We eat here often and live in Little Elm. Worth the drive every Sunday after a big game!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ronald Ardt
user_reviews_extended.Description: The hard sharp toasted multigrain hoagie bun detracted from the chicken salad's flavor and texture. I could barely taste the chicken salad. When ordering, Be sure to repeat your bread selection two or three times to hopefully be served the bread you want on your sandwich!

user_reviews_extended.Name: B. Moore
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place is nice, atmosphere, and the food is tasty too.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joyce Amstutz
user_reviews_extended.Description: Didn't stay: only kiosk was available and it wasn't  working correctly.  No service to help, or take our order.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brandy Merritt
user_reviews_extended.Description: We order 3 lunches- all were very good. Only one thing, our chips were not in the bag. No biggie-

user_reviews_extended.Name: weasey1337
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered two sandwiches and they mixed up the condiments, bad first impression probably wouldn’t return

user_reviews_extended.Name: KJ
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’m in love with the pimento grilled cheese sandwich. I drive a long distance just to eat here sometimes. I wish they would open a location in the Mesquite or Sunnyvale area! It would blow the competition out of the water with their food quality and taste.

user_reviews_extended.Name: K Keene
user_reviews_extended.Description: Awesome upscale deli-like location. Ordered the salmon ceasar salad and it was absolutely fantastic. The staff welcomed our cross country team of twenty and got us all squared away.

user_reviews_extended.Name: P W Green
user_reviews_extended.Description: Always great food and fresh.  I would love to say everything on the menu is great, however I always get the Newk's Q sandwich so haven't tried a lot of other items.  I can tell you my family has tried lots of different items and loved everything.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Valerie Bruce
user_reviews_extended.Description: So many amazing things to say….. the food is great, prices are on point, always clean, the staff are kind….  The best chicken salad sandwich, Newk’s fav (i change out some things) and their flatbreads are my go to!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Margie Thomas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love the size portions on the salads and the seasonal cups. The Mgr is very friendly and the staff works fast to assist in anything required.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Christy Talley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Dine in or take out the service is good and the food is yummy... The food never disappoints.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bill Bruskas
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love the Q pizza, but a few crumbs of bacon with several pieces having none at all was disappointing

user_reviews_extended.Name: William Waddell
user_reviews_extended.Description: The service was quick and they got my order right. It was a newks q without cheese and a half Caesar salad. Their Caesar salad is goated and the sandwich is good. I am also happy that they brought back the red velvet cake

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rollina Katako
user_reviews_extended.Description: My daughter loves the pepperoni pizza and I love the chicken one with jalapeños. We’ve been going there for years and love it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lauren Grey
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ate here for the first time with my in-laws last night. Overall, the establish was clean and the service was good. Received my pizza in about ten to fifteen minutes and it was hot and fresh. The pizza was not that great, but not bad. Although it was warm, it was lacking flavor and the toppings just slid off as you attempted to eat it. For the price, I did not find my meal worth it.

user_reviews_extended.Name: R.S. Dickerson
user_reviews_extended.Description: This location had a very quick and efficient ordering method. The menu boards are large and to the side of the ordering area which is a great idea other fast casual restaurants should pick up on. The food was very enjoyable as we had the pepperoni pizza and a Cobb salad. This was one of the best pizzas I have had in a while as the crust was thinner and the ingredients were “center stage” to the normal thicker crust pizzas. The atmosphere here was also very laid back it seemed. Not too loud even with a more than half full restaurant. People were ordering for pickup as there was a separate entry and register for this. Efficient process for sure.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Cody Ash
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was very delicious and the staff was super nice

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristina Jenkins
user_reviews_extended.Description: Salads are delicious and my kids loved the pizza

user_reviews_extended.Name: sarah sillitoe
user_reviews_extended.Description: Power trip manager was rude not only to me but the servers! I watched it multiple times while sitting down eating and I would not support that, they must be miserable. When I asked for the owner she said “why” went to check and told he he’s on the phone. She was short glasses short hair I think her name was Katie? She was rude to one server I saw multiple times I would’ve walked out, she had brown hair glasses and and a red shirt

user_reviews_extended.Name: Fire K
user_reviews_extended.Description: I really enjoyed the food!  Fresh and delicious. I had tomato soup with a half salad, so a fair price as well for the amount of food you get.  They did charge for extra cheese(55 cents), yet it didn't appear to be extra.  I went to ask about it, and also get more.  She told me, "that is extra."  It was a bit of attitude in there.  They did provide more after I asked though. Some places charge for extra onions, but they did not.  Food great. Service could do with a bit of upgrading. Thank you!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristin Chandler
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had an issue with my DoorDash order and drove to the store myself since it was never delivered. I was already having a stressful day and then my food was stolen from the delivery driver. Carlos greeted me when I walked in and immediately wanted to make the situation right. He remade my salad and his genuine kindness really turned my day around. The smallest acts of kindness really make all the difference. Thanks again, Carlos! Y’all be sure to stop in and give them a try!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lisa Koci
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve been in Texas for almost 4 years and the service we received tonight was probably the worst I’ve had since we moved here. Lots of restaurants are understaffed, often service is slow but the way Duncan treated me was just awful. My husband I ordered two bowls of soup and a sandwich AND Diet Coke. When I went to fill my Diet Coke there was no syrup. I asked another worker if they could check in it since the guy who took my order (Duncan) was helping other guests. I believe I got an affirmative reply so just waited. Tried the soda again, still nothing. Waited some more. My Diet Coke is a big deal to me so I kept poking at the machine, hoping it would be fixed. Finally a young lady said the syrup was fine but the machine wasn’t working. I asked if there was any other place to get Diet Coke in the store. She said no. I saw Duncan and asked him if the Diet Coke was going to work anytime soon. He said he’d check it out WHEN HE HAD TIME. I had been there for probably 10-15 minutes at that point, there was no one in line. We still didn’t have our food so I told him I just wanted our money refunded. I said it would have been nice to have been told immediately that there was a problem. Then my husband asked for the corporate number because Mr. Duncan was throwing some snark and he said he had no idea about anything to do with corporate. I told him he needed to learn a bit more about customer service and he started saying I should do stand up comedy-which made no sense because there was nothing amusing happening. Then he offered me a job app-maybe Duncan should do comedy because he has absolutely zero idea how to work with the public. It actually sounds funny but the way he treated me was so unexpected and mean. My husband did curse, he was now mad at the way this young man was talking to me. Duncan gave me a receipt for the return and the transaction was voided. What I find troubling is that this young man had no respect for a customer. I was not rude at all initially. Instead of actually CARING about my concerns, he blew me off. I know it’s tough hiring good help, I know not everyone should work in customer facing roles (Talking to you Duncan), and maybe this young man was having a really bad day, I don’t know but what I do know is I will never step foot in this Newk’s again, I won’t stop by with friends or bring my elderly parents by either. If this boy thinks it was okay to treat ANY HUMAN with the disregard he showed me, then that probably isn’t a place I want to be. It’s too bad because this place has ok reviews. I wish them well. But having your employees be willing to double down on rudeness with a guest show there is a much bigger problem with this business than meets the eye.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bill Greenberg
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great variety and selection of dishes. Their salads and wraps are excellent.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kayla Nelson
user_reviews_extended.Description: The food and service is always great!  Everything is so fresh. The only negative is some of the older tables are sticky from being cleaned so many times. The varnish has come off of them.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lx
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is good. And I usually have a great experience, but today the experience was a bit iffy. The female manager that was on duty was somewhat rude. I don’t believe the saying “the customer is always right” bc that’s false, but I do believe businesses should strive to provide good customer service always and be respectful to guests. If your system is not up to date that’s not on the customer, and speaking to people in a snarky way is not cool. You wouldn’t have a job if not for the patrons. Kindness goes a long way.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jake Luedecke
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is probably the most consistent sandwich restaurant I've been to. I'm a fan of their pesto chicken, club and Newk's "Q" sandwiches. Their sweet tea is also very good. Service is nice and fast. Overall a great lunch spot for anyone looking for sandwiches, soups, or even pizza.

user_reviews_extended.Name: John Thompson
user_reviews_extended.Description: We ordered takeout this time, and next time, I'll check the order before I leave.  They left off the shrimp from my salad. They were friendly, and I got the free desert advertised, but I had to ask, as it wouldn't let me add it to my order in the app. The food is always good,  so we'll be back again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: breonna brooks
user_reviews_extended.Description: The chicken on the barbecue pizza was so bland. The pizza dough was hard the macaroni and cheese bland literally rating it two  add a five stars just because at least it was hot I’m not a fan. I didn’t go into the restaurant. I order delivery so I can’t rate the rest of the experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: george hoyt
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’ve ordered here a few times. Food is always delicious and prepared quickly. In out and no fuss. Good value for the money as well

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aira Robinson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I went here for the first time because my partner really wanted to eat here. I had their New Salmon Caesar Salad and a bowl
Of Gumbo. It was the worse. The salmon on the salad was old and hard. Looked like it had been sitting out for awhile. Definitely not fresh. The gumbo was serve cold. Very disappointed. I will
Not me going back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: LaChrissa Davis
user_reviews_extended.Description: A consistent win! I work right on the other side of the tollway from Newks, so I drop in often for lunch or dinner. This is one of my favorite places in the area! The salads, soups, pizzas, & cakes are always DELICIOUS! I haven’t been disappointed yet. Great food is always a plus but friendly people make it all the better. Marcus is always so professional and polite! He takes pride in providing excellent service. Diana’s friendly, smiling face made my dining experience very pleasant.

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Kipp
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great salads, soups and sandwiches at a reasonable price.  Plenty of seating and friendly service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: R David Taylor
user_reviews_extended.Description:
This used be, not only one of the best experiences around, with great food, but a pretty good bargain...the reason we stopped mid-shop at Christmas.

Lack of staff, those present serving cold soup, wrong orders, orders in parts (not just to us...witnessed with other upset customers) and employees seemingly put out, or with no affect, on the other end with requests for corrections.  (THEY DIDN'T UNDERSTAND THE SIGNIFIGANCE OF COLD SOUP!  That guy was REALLY frustrated and upset.  Ha)

The food would be the savior....cold, changed recipes and ordered from our phones (still requiring help from staff, as all options are not available)...again, a week before Christmas.

If this is not a time for full staff and service...when is?

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brandon Noack
user_reviews_extended.Description: This place is amaze balls! For a little over $12 I ordered a 10 inch pizza (Sausage & Pepperoni) & a bowl of soup (loaded potato). Both were absolutely excellent. Was very surprised at the quality of food versus the price. Definitely worth a stop. (The 5 cheese Mac n Cheese is dang good as well)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Luis Reyna
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time here and it was amazing. I will be back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mark Jaggers
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time here and the food is good. I enjoyed the Italian sandwich, the Philly, the mac & cheese, and the lobster bisque. The only reason for the 4 star is because the place is a little dated on the inside. The booths and the chairs really need a good cleaning or need to be replaced. Overall, good food tho.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rick Anderson
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I've been to several Newk's locations and this one is top notch. This location is always clean, their people are always extremely friendly, and the Manager who runs the food out to you always checks to see if you need anything when delivering your food, which is normally brought out very quickly.

Plus their food is always top notch, namely the Loaded Potato Soup, which my "after" pic should tell you how tasty it really is.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Mike Young
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good but not great food. Sandwiches and pizza with meat are a little greasy but tasty. Dining room cleanliness varies. Post-lunch rush, they don't seem to be in a hurry to tidy things up. Soda cups are large (32 oz?) and there are free refills. Bathroom tends to be clean. They do a good takeout business.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jasmine Lopez
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I tried Newks for the first time and I am definitely a fan! I got the Newks club and the bread was toasted to perfection and the sandwich was very big and filling.
I ordered my sandwich without honey mustard but decided not to complain when it came on the sandwich, I’m not usually a fan of honey mustard but it worked well and tasted great on this sandwich. This just may be my new favorite sandwich spot.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tim Figura
user_reviews_extended.Description: We were a large group un announced on the back of lunch hour. Manager helped get our orders quickly. The sandwich I purchased was really nothing special. I would not seek this place out to come back for the food. However, the service was top notch.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shutterbug
user_reviews_extended.Description: Nice sandwich and salad place. Service is friendly and fairlynquick. The meal portions are good. Seating is usually good and even in a busy day turns over at a decent pace. You kight need to ask for table cleaning service but otherwise they open as ppl eat and go.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Irving G (TygeR)
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great place to stop in and eat a bite! Delivery is good as well but eating at the location always feels way more fresh and tasty. My Favorite has to be their soup selection and my GF's and I's favorite has to be the Cobb Salad (she loves Bleu cheese with hers, I love Ranch with mine). But their pizzas are delicious and desserts are really solid as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Elizabeth Glazener
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love their sandwiches and salads, and they have great iced tea. Many healthy options to choose from and very fast service.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Junius McCranley
user_reviews_extended.Description: Love going here and the food is delicious

user_reviews_extended.Name: Don Powell
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is my second visit to Newks. The first time I had soup and sandwich, and this time I had their pizza. Both times the food was great, and the staff was friendly and on the ball. I couldn't help notice the salads and toppings bar. They looked great, and I'm looking forward to my next visit!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kevin Lowry
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Love this place. Great food that is unique, extremely delicious, and the ingredients seem simple and wholesome.

Not to mention the manager is super nice, and completely involved in every aspect of the restaurant. Employees are also all very friendly and offer great service.  Been coming here for several years and it's my favorite lunch place compared to McAllister's etc.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ms. Pac
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Who the heck started raving about this place???? This place is over rated.

I originally tried to order a slice of caramel cake but they were out so I settled for chocolate. I then ordered the bbq chicken pizza.

The pizza was not good at all . They put the chicken on top of all the other toppings and then baked it. The chicken was hard and dry. Just horrible. Papa Johns could do better. The chocolate cake was nasty. It was cold and very soggy.

Im not sure what the hype is about but I will never order here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Keli Calderon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food arrived quickly. My boys were both happy with their food (sandwich and pizza) however, my salad was full of wilted lettuce.  When I asked for a container for my son’s leftover food, they handed me a dirty container! Left very disappointed and quite disgusted.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kristy V.
user_reviews_extended.Description: Had to cancel our order because our people were sick from covid. The restaurant instead of charging a nominal cancelation fee for an order they did not start making and didn't order any extra items for, wanted to be greedy and charge the entire $957 for not being bale to make the food. Terrible customer service. We can understand a nominal cancelation fee but the entite price for something you didn't even start making? GREEDY! On out list as a company that has lost our money for the future.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Joe Ivey
user_reviews_extended.Description: One of our favorite places. Good food, efficient service with a laid-back atmosphere. They genuinely want to serve you.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Farhan Saleem
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food was excellent. No knock on that part. Service was subpar. My wife went to use the restroom, an employee walked out without washing her hands. The lady that was cleaning up the tables kept giving us “looks” from the moment we came in, till we left. Cashier was cool. But this makes this restaurant unwelcoming.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stompy Hollo
user_reviews_extended.Description:
We discovered Newk's when we were between homes. It was the first time I ever had sweet tea without sugar.

The steak sandwich is really good, especially if you add the free roasted garlic. My wife loves the Mac & cheese but can never finish it so I get to share.

One of the more unusual dishes is the Q. It has a white BBQ sauce on it and is now available as a pizza as well.

We've tried most of the menu from salads to cake and never had a bad dish.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lysa Bufford
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I learned about them Charlotte, NC and have had them here in Plano. Always good and still love my Chicken Salad Sandwich.
I used them to cater a work meeting and the portions were generous and priced reasonable. Hopefully this experience will get them to try your many other amazing offerings.
Now put one in West Frisco :-)

user_reviews_extended.Name: Aleena D
user_reviews_extended.Description: First time eating here as I always pass by it. Tomato soup was excellent but the BBQ pizza was just okay, missing some pizazz and the chicken itself was eh. This place is a tad overpriced as well and there are better places for lunch I’d say, but may give it another try with some other items on their menu.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Stormyi 007 C
user_reviews_extended.Description: I really enjoy the food at Newk's Eatery and whenever I work on the weekend I generally stop there on the way home or on my way to work to order something to eat.  There food is fresh and I enjoy eating there, but I had an incident that made me lose faith in the eatery.  Around November 3 I ordered and had door dash deliver an Avocado and Shrimp salad to my place of employment.  Once I received my food I was surprised as there was no Avocado on my salad.  I called and advised that I was at work so I could not come in to get a new salad.  I spoke with someone who took my name and address and said I would receive a gift card because of the inconvenience and I had paid for the avocado, well I waited and waited and never received the gift card.  I felt like they didn't care and I had paid for something that I never received.  Food is fresh, but  I just don't like spending my money on something and then being told one thing and another happens.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Brooke Costilla
user_reviews_extended.Description: Just ordered food through Uber Eats. The quality was extremely poor. Everything was dried out. I ordered the Newks Q and it was disgusting. Very dried out chicken besides there barley being any on the sandwich. A piece of bacon was thrown on the side. The sandwich was mostly bread. Also they forgot the soup that went along with the half sandwich and soup combo. I ordered my son a grilled cheese and it also a poor quality. I didn't know you could mess up a simple grilled cheese sandwich. My husband had the soup and salad and it locked decent. I have ordered from here in the past and don't recall the quality being so poor. It also doesn't help that I am now trying to find other food options to eat and the dog will get what we just ordered!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Texas Pride Realty
user_reviews_extended.Description: Newks is a healthy alternative to the big brand restaurant stores. The salads are really good here. The last time we were there the service was a little off, and I'm sure that's due to shortages and staff. You could tell that everyone there was overworked and needed a break.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kathleen Young
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like my "build your own" pizza, but it was a tiny bit oily.  We also ordered soups and cobb salad.  Friends had sandwiches. Everyone enjoyed the food, and the place was quiet enough for conversation.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Tammy Nado
user_reviews_extended.Description: It's pretty good.  Soups, salad, sandwiches,  pizza.  Their signature dish is a 4 cheese mac n cheese which was yummy.  Chicken salad needed more flavor imo.  Big to go cups & nice clean well decorated inside.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Luke Wallace
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good food at a good price. A little more interesting menu than your typical sandwich and salad spot. Nice relish bar with pickles, peppers, and "breadsticks"  that are more like long skinny crackers. The outdoor patio is nice when the weather permits, it's on the east side so you don't bake in the sun after lunch.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lorrie
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great food; friendly staff. This location has quickly become a favorite Sunday afternoon lunch/hangout spot. With so many menu options, there's something for everyone.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Denise Zinser
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love Newk’s!  Great lunch options, fresh and always gets the order correct.  The best tea & honey mustard!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Midori Jai Knight
user_reviews_extended.Description: The resturant and employees were nice and food looked great but..... The manager was rude and just nasty with an order. And when trying yo find a way to correct the issue her brushed me off.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kay Huff
user_reviews_extended.Description:
My manager rewarded our team with lunch brought in from Newks recently.  I chose the Cobb salad.  It was good but I had to pick out about 1/3 of the lettuce that was old and turning pink or black.  Also, the amount of dressing provided was not enough for such a large salad.

If this had been an eat-in order I would have sent the salad back.  Since it was to go, that was not really an option.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Rylan Andersson
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is seriously the most mid place ever.  Like, the most 5/10 place I think I've ever experienced.  There is nothing wrong with the food, it's just not very good.  1000% meh.  I'd eat here again if someone really wanted to for some reason, but I'd never come back on my own, especially in an area with so many good options.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nicole Greenfield
user_reviews_extended.Description: They have the BEST chicken salad!!!  I always get a small container to go for lunch. Their lobster bisque is on par with 5 star restaurants!!!  I love their stick crackers too!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kelly Flynn
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is usually good, not giving it as many stars as usual because I ordered a meal to go and ordered a piece of pumpkin cake and got a the caramel cake instead.  I didn’t realize until I made it back to my hotel and didn’t want to go back, but this is truly one of my pet peeves, I know people make mistakes, especially during peak times, but check and double check the order, and I should have done that as well.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Do
user_reviews_extended.Description: We ordered a huge order from THEIR website to be delivered. The delivery guy came with just a small pizza. We called them and told them they delivered the wrong order we ordered alot of food. They said it’s not their fault - What?! are we responsible for you not giving the correct order to your own delivery driver?! Sohail is the manager.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Antonio Avanti
user_reviews_extended.Description: I have had several items on the menu here and I have loved them. The tomato basil soup and veggie pizza are among the top favorites. If you want a chicken sandwich that will "hit the spot" and then some, mozy on in here.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Darcie Wells
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great, healthy fresh options. The freshest, tastiest and probably healthiest chicken salad sandwich spread I've ever had. My mouth is watering just typing this. I haven't had anything here I didn't enjoy.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Dena Chappell
user_reviews_extended.Description:
I started going to Newk’s when my employer opened in Cypress Waters.
I first tried the club sandwich amazing !!!
I later started eating  the ultimate salad it was also amazing. I introduced my sister to Newks she tried the pizza and recommended that I try it OMG !!! It too was amazing. Today is my mother’s birthday and I going to  try to figure out what to order.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Patrick Spreng
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The food was very good, but way too much. My wife and I both brought home enough of our salads to last another meal or two. I had the Newk's Favorite while she had the Black & Bleu. Neither of us had ever even heard of Newk's before but the layout was in the same format as Pandora where you order when you first enter the restaurant, serve your own drinks, and then pick where you want to sit, putting your order number on the rack so they know where to bring it. There is also a large bar where they have condiments like ketchup and jalapeño slices.

We live more than fifteen miles from Newk's and only went because it was close to where we had a doctor's appointment. But we will certainly go back to try the rest of the menu, which has many sandwiches, pizzas, pastas and more salads to try!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Alison Franco
user_reviews_extended.Description: Quick service, clean restaurant, delicious food! Ordered the Pesto Chicken with a side of pasta salad and The Newks 'Q' with a side of Tomato Basil Soup. Everything tasted fresh and warm, will definitely be back when we're craving a yummy sandwich or a warm soup.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Radius Alias
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The food was alright, but it's not worth the premium prices. I suspect that having your own branded chips and thick cups ala Dickeys raises your prices somewhat.I could do without either and would rather get out the door at a fairer price for such basic menu items.

A greek salad, a club sandwich, and two drinks was 25 bucks. Compared to other options available in town, this isn't that great of a value.

Adding to that a pretty strong, and not easily identifiable smell hits your nose when you enter the door.

The cloth seat cushions are really dirty and gross looking.

The numbers for your table felt like old greasy coasters so scratched up you could barely see the number on the card.

Big meh.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Teodor Spiridon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Good deli style place.  If you like Jason's Deli or MacAlister's then you'll likely be a fan of this place.  Their food is a little different, but they have really good salads and soups and I highly suggest their Newk's Q sandwich.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Kaite Renee
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great place to have a quick lunch or a long dinner with the family. Service is super fast and friendly they have something for everyone with a constantly changing menu items for every season. You can't go wrong .

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jamie L
user_reviews_extended.Description: Newk's has so many wonderful food choices. Sandwiches are awesome, salads are plentiful with several options. I appreciate the many vegetarian options. The Mac n cheese is really good!

user_reviews_extended.Name: candice trevino
user_reviews_extended.Description: Food is always really fresh and the service/employees are friendly! Lots to choose from on the menu from pizza, sandwiches, salads and soups to cakes. Definitely try this place! Wish there were more locations in the area.

user_reviews_extended.Name: KH DC
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tried this place a few times when we lived in the area. The service is always super friendly and it always seemed to be very popular/busy. I never quite got the hype over the food though--it was decent, but nothing special.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Shafiq
user_reviews_extended.Description: Whoever created the menu is a clueless cook. I had a chicken pesto sandwich, and it was horrible. Red velvet cake was worst than Walmart version, hard, dry and flavorless. I could have a  better meal in eatzis paying the same price. Not sure how they even stay in business.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bill Braun
user_reviews_extended.Description: Excellent eats. Menu is easy.  Had sandwich & salad, all very good.  Diner like atmosphere, but more upscale.  Great condiment bar with breadsticks and pickles.  A+

user_reviews_extended.Name: Russell Smith
user_reviews_extended.Description: Really a great chill place with good service and tasty selections. The Southern Salad was really good with the Greek dressing! If you're looking for a light meal that's quick and moderately priced, then this place is worth a try!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bridgette J Lucious
user_reviews_extended.Description: I love the supreme pizza with cauliflower crust 😋 and the lobster bisque soup is supreme in taste

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janet S
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’m so happy I found this place! Their chicken salad is awesome as is the green goddess salad. I keep coming back!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Charlotte McKee
user_reviews_extended.Description: I was favorably impressed.  Had the shrimp remoulade salad which had nice big shrimp and tasted good, but there was no resemblance to remoulade flavor in the dressing.  It tasted more like caeser dressing with a little mustard.  I will go there again and try other things,  I believe the ingredients in the salad were well worth the price.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Atom Jarvis
user_reviews_extended.Description: I’m sitting at Newks right now, having taken only a couple of bites of my Chicken Pesto sandwich and the coke slaw side and was so impressed that I had to tear myself away from my food to give this place 5 stars because I am instantly a fan. On top of excellent food (so many others don’t get cole slaw right and this place does it perfectly) they have little niceties like a complimentary side bar with free breadsticks, plastic reusable cups that you can keep and their staff has been friendly and welcoming the second I walked in. I work right around a corner and they now have a committed regular.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Gina
user_reviews_extended.Description: We eat here often and always have great food, atmosphere, and service. Menu highlights are gluten-free pizza, salads, and rice krispy treats.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lauren Loveless
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered delivery through their app and my food was never delivered. The food delivery service won’t help me because I ordered through the Newk’s app, and the employee at Newk’s says he can’t help me. Would not even remake my order for pickup. Very disappointing as we go here quite often. Definitely won’t be back, just upset that there is no way for me to get my money back.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Nick Mears
user_reviews_extended.Description: I never had the opportunity to actually try their food. I placed an order online for carryout and received an email confirmation, however, the driver never delivered.  When I called the store an hour later, two employees indicated that they never saw my order come through.  A third employee indicated he knew my order was picked up and told me to call Dining In as they are the third party delivery company.  Dining In never allowed me to inquire about my delivery after attempting to talk to a human.  My first impression remains that if you fail to deliver, or if your system fails to deliver, on providing its service then you have lost my business in the future. This was unfortunate but displays a real problem you may run into utilizing a third party delivery system and employees that don't know they even offer a delivery option.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jenni Barnett
user_reviews_extended.Description: I'll give them one more chance.  Ordered through Door Dash.  That was the first mistake since no descriptions are under the selections in the app.  So I called Newk's directly.  I ordered a half and half.  I was told the tomato basil soup was the selection but not told it had goat cheese as a garnish.  I hate goat cheese!  Despise it!  It makes me sick!  I had to throw out the entire cup.  Ordered a half pimiento cheese sandwich.  Again, was not told nor is it on the website that it is heated.  It was a greasy mess!  All this for $12!!  Very overpriced.  At least at Panera Bread or Corner Bakery you get chips, fruit, carrots, etc.  #feelrobbed

user_reviews_extended.Name: Ana Martin
user_reviews_extended.Description: How have a driven by this amazing restaurant for years and never stopped 😯.  Amazing sandwiches, soups or just a quick salad.  Great over all lunch or dinner you'll definitely love anything you get 😋😃

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jason Christian
user_reviews_extended.Description: Lobster bisque is back and so am I. I don't understand why they ever take it off the menu to begin with and I only eat here when its available. I like the Chicken Bacon Club with Lobster Bisque!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lee Tucker-Horne
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great place for a quick phone in and pick up a variety of choices from good salads to pizza! Reasonable pricing, too! My husband loves the strawberry cake!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Bobby Crotty
user_reviews_extended.Description: So excited Newk's is finally in Dallas! The food is awesome and healthy, and the desserts are phenomenal. Some of my favorites are the BBQ Chicken pizza and the Newk's "Q" sandwich. Their cakes are deadly too.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sherri Farrell
user_reviews_extended.Description: Oh, happy day!!! Newk's is in DFW!!!!  I havem't been to this location, but I'm thrilled Newk's is HERE!!!!  I've been to the one in Jackson, MS, several times and love it.  Their pizza is fantastic and the atmosphere is great.  Can't wait to try the Plano location!!!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Diane Porter
user_reviews_extended.Description: This is one of my favorite places to eat! The food is delicious and the staff is courteous and friendly.  Their warm turkey sandwiches are soooooooo gooooood!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Pam Riegel
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great food! I crave Newk's Favorite Salad. Quick and easy to run in after long day of work for something to take home.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Sharekia Tucker
user_reviews_extended.Description: Fast and efficient!! Great food!! Pasta salad is a must have and the Carmel cake!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Lauren White
user_reviews_extended.Description:
LIED ABOUT DELIVERY:
I received an email and texts confirming that the dinner for my hospital nurses, techs and therapists was delivered. This was a lie. We were waiting for delievery- and called the EZ cater company with the poor excuse of there was a miscommunication and Newks can't fulfill the order tonight. 22 DINNERS NOT DELIVERED. Please reconsider using this establishment.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jesse Perry
user_reviews_extended.Description: I like their choose two menu.  It's perfect for lunch.  The pumpernickel bread that I get with the chicken salad sandwich is toasty, soft and really just perfect.  Great food!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Bascon
user_reviews_extended.Description: Tasty salads with great dressings. They give a good amount of salad for the price. It will definitely full you up. Fast service. I hear great Mac and cheese.

user_reviews_extended.Name: James Hill
user_reviews_extended.Description: I ordered an Ahi salad no lettuce due to my own conditions. They substituted 1 egg for all the lettuce I could not eat. I'll go back to Snappy Salads where they're fair with me. I'd eat lettuce if I could, but I don't like hospitals.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Olga Owen
user_reviews_extended.Description: As always the sandwiches are delicious, the service fantastic, everyone smiling and ready to help.  We love Newk’s

user_reviews_extended.Name: Marion Quinones
user_reviews_extended.Description: Ordered a chicken salad sandwich.  In the whole sandwich there was one quarter of a grape,  two large hunks of chicken.  The serving was a eighth of an inch thick.  I will never go here again.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Makalia Bosley
user_reviews_extended.Description: I came here and ordered Mac and cheese it took them a long time to get my food. The guy behind me got his food before I did. The food that I did get was entirely too high! Like 5 dollars for a small side of Mac and cheese! I will never come to Newks again ever!

user_reviews_extended.Name: David
user_reviews_extended.Description:
Underwhelming. The thick cut bacon promised on menu was the thin precooked kind.
Greek salad drowned in dressing....
Food does not match menu in appearance...
Overpriced for quality and amount of food

user_reviews_extended.Name: Larry Calton
user_reviews_extended.Description: Great food and great service.  I order out here for office lunch about 1x a week and always a good experience.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Yvonne Cooper
user_reviews_extended.Description:
The Potato soup is GREAT!
Get the Bowl! The cup is only a teaser!
The Chicken Bacon Club is GREAT also! Get the whole sandwich! because half just won't do!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Amy Cline
user_reviews_extended.Description: Shrimp poboy was very tasty. Lots of options  to please a crowd. Our group got pizza and 3 different sandwiches and everyone was pleased with their selection.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Taylor S
user_reviews_extended.Description: $13 for four shrimp and cocktail sauce bread = shrimp Po boy. Terrible value and zero flavor. Website feedback was ignored too.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Michael Cole
user_reviews_extended.Description: I go here for lunch probably 3 times a month consistently. I love the food. It us ALWAYS good. Even slammed qt lunch it comes out quick.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Jonathan Mason
user_reviews_extended.Description: The six cheese bacon 🧀 Pinto cheese mac and cheese is amazing I got bariatric surgery in June and they offer a half size which is perfect for me so anyone who has that you should be fine.

user_reviews_extended.Name: Janet Leigh
user_reviews_extended.Description: I had the turkey avocado sub and it was DELISH!!! At only 790 calories I could enjoy it guilt free!

user_reviews_extended.Name: Clarence Johnson
